problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
